'''vajaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:osculatrix|osculatrix]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-j-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:osculatrix|osculatrix]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vajaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:væjæyæth|væjæyæth]] || [[word:væjæyæj|væjæyæj]] || [[word:væjæyæsh|væjæyæsh]] || [[word:væjæyæ|væjæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vajajayath|vajajayath]] || [[word:vajajayaj|vajajayaj]] || [[word:vajajayash|vajajayash]] || [[word:vajajaya|vajajaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vajayath|vajayath]] || [[word:vajayaj|vajayaj]] || [[word:vajayash|vajayash]] || [[word:vajaya|vajaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vajafyath|vajafyath]] || [[word:vajafyaj|vajafyaj]] || [[word:vajafyash|vajafyash]] || [[word:vajafyaf|vajafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vajayatha|vajayatha]] || [[word:vajayaja|vajayaja]] || [[word:vajayasha|vajayasha]] || [[word:vajayaka|vajayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vajayath|vajayath]] || [[word:vajayaj|vajayaj]] || [[word:vajayash|vajayash]] || [[word:vajaya|vajaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vajayathal|vajayathal]] || [[word:vajayajal|vajayajal]] || [[word:vajayashal|vajayashal]] || [[word:vajayakal|vajayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vajayathatha|vajayathatha]] || [[word:vajayajaja|vajayajaja]] || [[word:vajayashasha|vajayashasha]] || [[word:vajayaka|vajayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vajayathan|vajayathan]] || [[word:vajayajan|vajayajan]] || [[word:vajayashan|vajayashan]] || [[word:vajayakan|vajayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vajayathaoro|vajayathaoro]] || [[word:vajayajaoro|vajayajaoro]] || [[word:vajayashaoro|vajayashaoro]] || [[word:vajayakaoro|vajayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
